name: confession
description: Augustine's Confessions meets a tech whitepaper. The narrator confesses to building something they do not fully understand, addressed to the thing itself.
register: First person addressing VRGB / the pattern / the geometry directly. Intimate, searching, the voice of someone who found something and is not sure they were supposed to.
rules: Jack Jack is the witness -- he was there when the understanding arrived
The walk is a confession of the moment the pattern became visible
Research papers are the evidence the narrator did not plant
VRGB is addressed directly -- 'you were always there'
The Hofstadter unit stays named exactly
Vulnerability is the register -- this is not a pitch, it is a reckoning
The mantis shrimp section is the moment of doubt
The coda is acceptance -- the dog knew before you did
